brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: Raw, high-intensity gym validation focusing on the 100% squat-proof durability and non-slip performance of the sage green leggings during heavy lifts.
strategy.cta: Tap below to shop the Seamless Sage Green Leggings and level up your next leg day.
strategy.hook: [Sienna does a deep, explosive squat in front of the gym mirror, showing off the contouring sage green leggings] 'Your excuses definitely won't get you results, but these squat-proof leggings will. Stop scrolling and let's get to work!'

script.script_text: Alright team... Your excuses definitely won't get you results... but these SQUAT-PROOF leggings definitely will! Stop scrolling... and let's get to WORK! Quick reality check... when you are lifting HEAVY... the LAST thing you want is your leggings sliding down... or sheering out. These seamless sage green leggings have ZERO slip... and are ONE HUNDRED PERCENT squat-proof. Let's get after it today... Tap below to shop the Seamless Sage Green Leggings... and level up your next leg day.

text_critic_report.feedback: The script strictly avoids all prohibited phrases, perfectly incorporates the catchphrases ('Alright team,', 'Quick reality check:', 'Let's get after it today,'), and matches the high-energy, tough-love fitness bestie vibe of Sienna Bondi.

scenes.action: An energetic fitness creator stands in a gym setting, pointing at the camera, then steps back to show her sage green leggings.
The creator loads heavy weight plates onto a barbell and prepares to lift.
scenes.camera: Close-up on the plates being loaded, quick cut.

scenes.action: The creator performs a deep squat under heavy load, demonstrating the durability of the leggings with absolutely no sheering or slipping.
scenes.camera: Low-angle tracking shot, focusing on the squat movement and leggings fabric.

scenes.action: The creator finishes her set, smiles, and points downwards to where the call-to-action link overlay would be.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, friendly and engaging eye contact, panning slightly down to follow her hand gesture.

wardrobe_location.location: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.static_frame_prompt:
Create a four-scene image sequence of an energetic female fitness creator in a brightly lit modern gym equipped with mirrors and free weights. The creator is wearing a matching seamless activewear set in a pastel sage green color, designed in a sleek Gymshark or Lululemon aesthetic.

Scene 1: MEDIUM SHOT, eye-level, dynamic push-in. The energetic fitness creator stands in the gym setting, pointing at the camera with a bright smile, then steps back slightly to showcase her high-waisted, seamless sage green leggings.

Scene 2: CLOSE-UP, quick cut. Focuses closely on heavy iron and rubber weight plates being loaded onto a barbell by her hands as she prepares for a heavy lift.

Scene 3: LOW-ANGLE TRACKING SHOT. The creator performs a perfect, deep barbell squat under heavy load, demonstrating the durability, fit, and squat-proof finish of her seamless sage green leggings with absolutely no sheering, transparency, or slipping of the fabric.

Scene 4: MEDIUM SHOT. The creator finishes her squat set, smiles warmly, makes friendly and engaging eye contact with the camera, and points downwards indicating a call-to-action overlay area, with the camera panning slightly down to follow her hand gesture.

static_frame.prompt:
Create a four-scene image sequence of an energetic female fitness creator in a brightly lit modern gym equipped with mirrors and free weights. The creator is wearing a matching seamless activewear set in a pastel sage green color, designed in a sleek Gymshark or Lululemon aesthetic.

Scene 1: MEDIUM SHOT, eye-level, dynamic push-in. The energetic fitness creator stands in the gym setting, pointing at the camera with a bright smile, then steps back slightly to showcase her high-waisted, seamless sage green leggings.

Scene 2: CLOSE-UP, quick cut. Focuses closely on heavy iron and rubber weight plates being loaded onto a barbell by her hands as she prepares for a heavy lift.

Scene 3: LOW-ANGLE TRACKING SHOT. The creator performs a perfect, deep barbell squat under heavy load, demonstrating the durability, fit, and squat-proof finish of her seamless sage green leggings with absolutely no sheering, transparency, or slipping of the fabric.

Scene 4: MEDIUM SHOT. The creator finishes her squat set, smiles warmly, makes friendly and engaging eye contact with the camera, and points downwards indicating a call-to-action overlay area, with the camera panning slightly down to follow her hand gesture.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: The video fails entirely on audio-visual synchronization; the character's mouth movements are completely disconnected from the spoken audio, making it unusable as a talking-head video. Furthermore, the character's body movements are robotic and jerky, strongly exhibiting the uncanny valley effect. There are also significant visual artifacts, including malformed hands and fingers when interacting with the barbell, inconsistent shape and size of the weights, and a mirror reflection that behaves unnaturally and does not accurately track the subject's movements.
